title: CRISPR knockout of EZH1 in AML cell line
author: Genna M. Luciani
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We wanted to ensure the specificity of the EZH1 antibody that I was working with in previous posts, as well as creating a useful reagent to use in future experiments by generating a CRISPR knockout line of EZH1.
steps_raw: We wanted to ensure the specificity of the EZH1 antibody that I was working with in previous posts, as well as creating a useful reagent to use in future experiments by generating a CRISPR knockout line of EZH1.
